Bash(source .venv/bin/activate && python3 -c "
from app import app, db
with app.app_context\(\):
    db.create_all\(\)
with app.test_client\(\) as c:
    paths = [
        \('/', 'dashboard'\),
        \('/experiments', 'experiments list'\),
        \('/experiments/new', 'new experiment'\),
        \('/experiments/offer/1', 'experiment offer'\),
        \('/protocols/new', 'new protocol \(with active_experiment check\)'\),
        \('/protocols/1/edit', 'edit protocol'\),
    ]
    for path, label in paths:
        r = c.get\(path\)
        print\(f'{label}: {r.status_code}'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(git add app.py database.py static/css/style.css templates/base.html templates/index.html templates/new_protocol.html templates/edit_protocol.html templates/experiments.html templates/new_experiment.html templates/assess_experiment.html templates/experiment_offer.html && git status --short)

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
add Experiments feature

- Experiment model: tracks name, hypothesis, linked protocol, start date,
  stabilization period, status, outcome rating/notes, and decision
- Experiments page: active experiments with progress bar and weeks remaining,
  ready-to-assess highlight, multi-experiment warning banner, completed and
  abandoned sections
- Start experiment form with live assessment date preview \(JS\)
- Assessment form: outcome rating slider, notes, and continue/pause/stop
  decision \(auto-updates linked protocol status on pause/stop\)
- Experiment offer page: prompted after adding a new active preventative —
  "Would you like to track this as an experiment?"
- Soft warning modal on new/edit protocol when an experiment is active and
  user is activating a protocol — "Add it anyway" or "Wait"
- Dashboard: ready-to-assess banner with direct link when assessment date passed
- Nav: Experiments link added between Protocols and Symptoms \(reordered\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(lsof -ti :5001 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; sleep 1 && source .venv/bin/activate && python app.py)

Bash(cd ~/migraine-tracker && git add templates/base.html templates/checkin.html static/css/style.css && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
standardize nav icons to outline SVGs; fix checkin loading bug

- All nav icons replaced with 16×16 outline SVGs using stroke="currentColor"
  and stroke-width="1.5": chat bubble, house, 4-pointed star, clipboard,
  conical flask, heart, gear/sunburst — all inherit the inactive grey and
  active purple from existing .nav-link CSS, no colored emoji
- .nav-icon updated to display:flex / align-items:center so SVGs sit
  correctly in the flex row instead of relying on text-align
- Fix checkin loading state: disabled <textarea> fields are excluded from
  form submission by browsers, so the server received an empty message and
  redirected without processing, leaving the typing indicator stuck forever.
  Fix by disabling the button only and setting opacity on the textarea, plus
  adding a proper submitting flag to block Enter-key double-submits

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(source .venv/bin/activate && python -c "import app; print\('App loaded OK'\)" 2>&1)

Bash(source .venv/bin/activate && python -c "
from jinja2 import Environment, FileSystemLoader
env = Environment\(loader=FileSystemLoader\('templates'\)\)
for t in ['index.html', 'assess_experiment.html', 'base.html']:
    env.get_template\(t\)
    print\(f'{t} - OK'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(source .venv/bin/activate && python -c "
from app import app
with app.test_client\(\) as c:
    resp = c.get\('/'\)
    print\(f'Dashboard: {resp.status_code}'\)
    # Check it contains our new sections
    data = resp.data.decode\(\)
    checks = [
        \('head_extra/chart.js', 'chart.js' in data or 'chart-empty-state' in data\),
        \('symptom cards', 'avg this month' in data or 'symptom-stat-grid' in data or 'chart-empty-state' in data\),
        \('rescue-table or no rescue', True\),
    ]
    for name, ok in checks:
        print\(f'  {name}: {\\"PASS\\" if ok else \\"FAIL\\"}'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(source .venv/bin/activate && python -c "
from app import app
with app.test_client\(\) as c:
    # Seed test data
    resp = c.get\('/dev/seed'\)
    print\(f'Seed: {resp.status_code}'\)
    
    # Now check dashboard has chart data
    resp = c.get\('/'\)
    data = resp.data.decode\(\)
    checks = [
        \('Chart.js CDN loaded', 'chart.js@4' in data\),
        \('episodeFreqChart canvas', 'episodeFreqChart' in data\),
        \('symptomTrendChart canvas', 'symptomTrendChart' in data\),
        \('Rescue table', 'rescue-table' in data\),
        \('Protocol annotations JS', 'protocolAnnotations' in data\),
        \('Trends section header', 'Last 12 weeks' in data\),
        \('avg this month label', 'avg this month' in data\),
    ]
    for name, ok in checks:
        print\(f'  {name}: {\\"PASS\\" if ok else \\"FAIL\\"}'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(source .venv/bin/activate && python -c "
from app import app, db
from database import Experiment
with app.app_context\(\):
    exp = Experiment.query.filter_by\(status='active'\).first\(\)
    if exp:
        print\(f'Testing assess for experiment: {exp.name} \(id={exp.id}\)'\)
        with app.test_client\(\) as c:
            resp = c.get\(f'/experiments/{exp.id}/assess'\)
            data = resp.data.decode\(\)
            print\(f'Status: {resp.status_code}'\)
            checks = [
                \('assess-layout', 'assess-layout' in data\),
                \('assess-data-panel', 'assess-data-panel' in data\),
                \('Episodes / Week', 'Episodes / Week' in data\),
                \('Avg Symptom Scores', 'Avg Symptom Scores' in data\),
                \('assessTrendChart', 'assessTrendChart' in data\),
                \('form still present', 'Complete Assessment' in data\),
            ]
            for name, ok in checks:
                print\(f'  {name}: {\\"PASS\\" if ok else \\"FAIL\\"}'\)
    else:
        # Try a completed experiment or any
        exp = Experiment.query.first\(\)
        if exp:
            print\(f'No active experiment; found: {exp.name} \(status={exp.status}\)'\)
        else:
            print\('No experiments in DB - assessment page test skipped'\)
" 2>&1)
